articles.title: Novak Djokovic wins 5-set Wimbledon thriller to reach semis - ESPN
articles.description: Novak Djokovic extended his streak of Wimbledon semifinal appearances to a record eight, outlasting No. 3 seed Felix Auger-Aliassime 7-6 (10), 3-6, 6-3, 6-7 (4), 7-6 (4) in a match that lasted 5 hours and 15 minutes.
